summon-lesser-demons.canonicalEvidence: As part of casting the spell, you can form a circle on the ground with the blood used as a material component.
summon-lesser-demons.structuredState: No optional blood-circle ground ward fields.
summon-lesser-demons.jsonState: Runtime JSON has the circle only in prose.
summon-lesser-demons.issue: The optional blood circle is a ground ward that restricts summoned demons, but it is not represented.
summon-lesser-demons.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime bloodCircle option with protected area around caster.

summon-lesser-demons.canonicalEvidence: You choose the unoccupied spaces you can see within range where they appear.
summon-lesser-demons.issue: The visibility requirement is represented for the placement target, though multi-placement remains open.
summon-lesser-demons.recommendedTemplateChange: No line-of-sight change required for this row.

summon-lesser-demons.canonicalEvidence: You utter foul words, summoning demons from the chaos of the Abyss.
summon-lesser-demons.issue: The foul words are casting presentation, not a separate communication mechanic.

summon-lesser-demons.canonicalEvidence: Two, four, or eight demons appear by table result; demons are hostile to all creatures, roll group initiative, have their own turns, and pursue and attack nearest non-demons.
summon-lesser-demons.structuredState: Effect Type: SUMMON; scaling prose records higher-level counts.
summon-lesser-demons.jsonState: Runtime JSON has no typed SUMMON effect.
summon-lesser-demons.issue: The summon count, CR cap, hostile behavior, group initiative, own turns, targeting behavior, and higher-slot multipliers are not represented.
summon-lesser-demons.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon table, behavior, initiative, hostility, and slot multiplier fields.
summon-lesser-demons.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime SUMMON data for table outcomes, hostileToAll, groupInitiative, ownTurns, attackNearestNonDemons, and level 6-7 x2 / 8-9 x3 count scaling.

summon-lesser-demons.canonicalEvidence: Using the material component in this manner consumes it when the spell ends.
summon-lesser-demons.structuredState: Consumed: false because the blood is only consumed when used for the optional circle.
summon-lesser-demons.jsonState: Runtime components isConsumed false and no conditional consumption data.
summon-lesser-demons.issue: The blood component has optional delayed consumption if used to form the circle.
summon-lesser-demons.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime componentConsumption conditional on bloodCircleUsed at spell end.

summon-lesser-demons.canonicalEvidence: A summoned demon disappears when it drops to 0 hit points or when the spell ends.
summon-lesser-demons.jsonState: Runtime JSON has no summon entity data.
summon-lesser-demons.issue: Summoned demons disappear at 0 HP, which requires typed summon lifecycle data.
summon-lesser-demons.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summonLifecycle disappearsAt0Hp and onSpellEnd.

summon-lesser-demons.canonicalEvidence: A summoned demon disappears when it drops to 0 hit points or when the spell ends. Using the material component in this manner consumes it when the spell ends.
summon-lesser-demons.structuredState: No summon lifecycle or delayed consumption fields.
summon-lesser-demons.jsonState: Runtime JSON has neither lifecycle nor delayed consumption data.
summon-lesser-demons.issue: Summon lifecycle endings and optional material consumption at spell end are not represented.
summon-lesser-demons.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon lifecycle and conditional component consumption fields.
summon-lesser-demons.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime lifecycle/consumption data tied to spell end and demon HP 0.

summon-lesser-demons.canonicalEvidence: A summoned demon disappears when it drops to 0 hit points or when the spell ends.
summon-lesser-demons.structuredState: No post-end aftermath beyond summon disappearance.
summon-lesser-demons.jsonState: Runtime JSON has no summon lifecycle.
summon-lesser-demons.issue: This is a summon lifecycle rule rather than a separate aftermath mechanic.
summon-lesser-demons.recommendedTemplateChange: No separate aftermath field required beyond summon lifecycle.
summon-lesser-demons.recommendedJsonChange: No separate aftermath runtime change required beyond summon lifecycle.

thunder-step.canonicalEvidence: Each creature within 10 feet of the space you left must make a Constitution saving throw, taking 3d10 thunder damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.
thunder-step.structuredState: Save/damage are represented; no origin-left-space burst field.
thunder-step.jsonState: Runtime DAMAGE effect has Constitution save half 3d10 Thunder, but no 10-foot burst around departure space.
thunder-step.issue: The save and damage are represented; the departure-space burst geometry is not.
thunder-step.recommendedTemplateChange: Add departure-origin burst fields for teleport damage.
thunder-step.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime damage area centered on origin space radius 10 feet.

thunder-step.canonicalEvidence: Teleport yourself to an unoccupied space you can see within range. You can also teleport one willing creature of your size or smaller within 5 feet; there must be an unoccupied space within 5 feet of your destination or it is left behind.
thunder-step.structuredState: Valid Targets: location; no passenger eligibility/destination-adjacent space fields.
thunder-step.jsonState: Runtime targeting ground with lineOfSight, but no unoccupied destination or passenger rules.
thunder-step.issue: Thunder Step has destination occupancy and optional passenger eligibility/placement rules that are not represented.
thunder-step.recommendedTemplateChange: Add teleport destination and passenger eligibility fields.
thunder-step.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime teleport data for unoccupied visible destination and optional passenger willing, size<=caster, within 5 feet, carrying capacity, destination space within 5 feet or left behind.
